snps.effect_template: LRRK2 G2019S mutation. Most common genetic cause of Parkinson's. FDA-approved 23andMe test.
GBA N370S variant. Major Parkinson's risk factor, especially in Ashkenazi Jewish populations.
SNCA (alpha-synuclein) locus. Common variant with modest effect on PD risk.

recommendation_template: No proven prevention exists, but regular exercise, quality sleep, and avoiding pesticide exposure may reduce risk. Discuss genetic counseling if carrying LRRK2/GBA variants.

studies.title: Mutations in LRRK2 cause autosomal-dominant parkinsonism
studies.finding: LRRK2 G2019S (rs34637584) is the most common genetic cause of familial and sporadic PD
